proof.title: This isn't theory. It's what happens.
proof.subtitle: Real results from people who were exactly where you are now.

items.title: 3 weeks to interviews
items.body: Most clients go from silence to real conversations in about three weeks once their story is dialed in.

items.title: $40K+ negotiated
items.body: Our average client negotiates over $40K more than the initial offer. Some significantly more.

items.title: Built by someone who's hired
items.body: Steve spent years on the other side of the table. He knows exactly what makes someone stand out.

testimonials.title: People like you. Real stories.
testimonials.subtitle: Engineers, PMs, finance leaders, marketers — they all felt stuck until something clicked.

coach.name: Steve J. Ngoumnai
coach.bio: I spent over a decade as an engineering leader, building teams and making hiring decisions. I've reviewed thousands of resumes and interviewed hundreds of candidates. I know exactly what makes someone memorable — and what gets them passed over. Now I help talented professionals stop being invisible and start landing the roles they deserve.

focus.title: You've probably been here
focus.subtitle: Stuck. Frustrated. Wondering what you're doing wrong.

items.title: Applications go nowhere
items.body: You've applied to dozens of roles. Maybe hundreds. Silence. Occasional rejections. No real conversations.

items.title: Promising interviews disappear
items.body: You thought it went well. They seemed interested. Then... nothing. No feedback. No closure.

items.title: You start questioning yourself
items.body: Maybe you're not as good as you thought. Maybe you're asking for too much. Maybe you should just settle.

steps.title: Here's how we get you unstuck
steps.subtitle: A clear path from where you are to where you want to be.

items.title: Get clear
items.body: We figure out exactly what roles fit your experience, what you're worth, and what's been getting in your way.

items.title: Get seen
items.body: Your resume and LinkedIn get rebuilt to actually show your value. Not tasks. Not buzzwords. Real impact.

items.title: Get offers
items.body: You walk into interviews prepared and confident. When offers come, you negotiate from strength.

leadMagnets.title: Not ready for a call? Start here.
leadMagnets.subtitle: Free resources to get you moving.

items.body: Find out exactly what's holding you back in 3 minutes.

items.body: 10 things you can fix right now to get more callbacks.

call.title: What happens when we talk
call.subtitle: 15 minutes. No pitch. Just clarity.

steps.title: We diagnose what's not working
steps.body: I'll review your materials before we talk and come prepared with specific feedback.

steps.title: We identify the #1 thing holding you back
steps.body: Usually it's one or two things. Your resume. Your pitch. Your approach. We find it.

steps.title: You leave with a clear action plan
steps.body: Whether we work together or not, you'll know exactly what to do next.

call.note: This isn't a sales call. I only take clients I know I can help. If that's not you, I'll tell you.
call.urgency: Only 4 strategy sessions available this week
call.guarantee: Leave with clarity — or get a second session free.

items.title: Missed interviews

items.title: Confidence erosion
items.body: The longer you're stuck, the harder it gets to believe you can break through.

for.title: This is for you if
for.body: You've got real experience and you're ready to be seen for what you're actually worth.
items: You're a senior IC, manager, or leader
You've been in the market and it's not working

You're tired of the guessing game and want a real system

notFor.title: This probably isn't for you if
notFor.body: We're not for everyone, and that's okay.
items: You're just starting your career and building fundamentals

items.body: Know exactly what roles you should target, what you're worth, and how to talk about yourself.

items.title: Materials That Work

risk.title: Zero risk. Here's our guarantee.
risk.body: If you don't walk away from our strategy call with complete clarity on your next steps, we'll schedule a second session at no charge. No questions asked.

related.title: Ready?
related.body: Let's figure out what's been getting in your way.

miniTestimonial.quote: Within 3 weeks I had 4 interviews lined up. Steve completely changed how I talk about my work.
miniTestimonial.name: Marcus T.

faq.title: Questions you might have
faq.subtitle: The stuff people usually ask before we talk.

items.question: What types of roles do you help with?
items.answer: Tech, finance, operations, marketing, sales, healthcare administration, and leadership roles. Senior ICs to executives. If you're not sure if we can help, just ask — we'll be honest.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: Most clients land their first real interview within 3 weeks. Full job search timelines vary, but we move fast.

items.question: Do you guarantee I'll get a job?
items.answer: No one can guarantee that. But we can guarantee you'll have the best possible materials, a clear strategy, and real preparation. What you do with it is up to you.

items.question: What if I don't know what role I want?
items.answer: That's more common than you'd think. We start by figuring out where your experience translates best. You don't need to have it all figured out.

items.question: Can you help with negotiation?
items.answer: Yes. We help you understand your leverage, prepare your ask, and handle the conversation. Most clients negotiate significantly more than they would have on their own.

items.question: What if I just need my resume fixed?
items.answer: We offer that a la carte. But honestly, a better resume alone rarely solves the whole problem. We'll help you figure out what you actually need.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Book a call. We'll talk for 15 minutes, figure out where you are, and map out next steps. No pressure.

cta.title: Every week you wait costs you interviews
cta.body: The job market moves fast. Your competition is getting coached. Let's make sure you're not falling behind.
cta.label: Claim My Free Strategy Session
cta.guarantee: Leave with a clear action plan or get a second session free
cta.proofSnippet: Join 147+ professionals who've accelerated their careers

coach.name: Steve J. Ngoumnai
coach.bio: I spent over a decade as an engineering leader, building teams and making hiring decisions. I've reviewed thousands of resumes and interviewed hundreds of candidates. I know exactly what makes someone memorable — and what gets them passed over. Now I help talented professionals stop being invisible and start landing the roles they deserve.

focus.title: You've probably been here
focus.subtitle: Stuck. Frustrated. Wondering what you're doing wrong.

items.title: Applications go nowhere
items.body: You've applied to dozens of roles. Maybe hundreds. Silence. Occasional rejections. No real conversations.

items.title: Promising interviews disappear
items.body: You thought it went well. They seemed interested. Then... nothing. No feedback. No closure.

items.title: You start questioning yourself
items.body: Maybe you're not as good as you thought. Maybe you're asking for too much. Maybe you should just settle.

items.title: Get offers
items.body: You walk into interviews prepared and confident. When offers come, you negotiate from strength.
